results.rendered_html:
kumārikā, kumārī
1 A young girl, one from 10 to 12 years old.
2 A maiden, virgin; trīṇi varṣāṇyudīkṣeta kumāryṛtumatī satī  Ms. 9. 90 ; 11. 59 ;
(pb) vyāvartatānyopagamātkumārī  R. 6. 69. 
3 A girl or daughter in general.
4 N. of Durgā.
5 N. of several plants.
6 N. of Sītā.
7 Large cardamoms.
8 The southern extremity of the Indian peninsula (cf. the modern name Cape Comorin).
Comp.
— putraḥ
1 the son of an unmarried woman.
2 N. of Karṇa.
— śvaśuraḥ the fatherin-law of a girl defiled before marriage.
